sentence.ab: Malu bay tnqiyan na cka rabi ciida,
asi lu hhlitan mnarux!
Kiya wada ku “qdanan” nganguc ka yaku,
elelu pkkiyux cnkkulan dha ciida,
knou bay nreysan knksaan dha ka kuwi snaw,
sppuyan mqriqu knksaan dha mniq twaan,
ini ku kkla mmusa inu ka yaku.
Binaw embiyax ku mkkiyux mquri brah,
mbiyax ku mrmux mquri twaan ka yaku,
kiya mtduwa ku mtblayaq mi mdhu mudus,
iyux uudus ka dkuwi snaw,
ppcikur mi ppbbil,
ppcbuc mi ppcbu,
pplawa mi ppdiras,
mbiyax bay ppbiyax mi pphuraw,

sentence.chinese: 子宮遍地傳來眾精友的哀號聲，
sentence.ab: bhangan mhnang ddiras lnngisan dkuwi snaw kana ka twaan,
duma u tmalang mi ppsbuc iyux nhari smkla mlatac twaan,

sentence.chinese: 有的推、擠、拉和倒下黃泉，
sentence.ab: duma u ppcikur, pkkiyux, ppblbil mi pptaqur musa tuxan,
duma u mkrbuk mi mkluwi lmawa ddayaw dmuuy bawa hyaan,

sentence.chinese: 有的後繼無力仆倒在地，
sentence.ab: duma u uka biyax bukuy na hiti mi mtaqur dxral,

sentence.chinese: 有的半途而廢而失生機，
sentence.ab: duma u ini dhuq nhdaan daw kiya wada malix mi wada smrahuq pcida knudus,
duma u knrmun bay msbotaw mquri brah,

sentence.chinese: 才發現只有我一個人活命，
sentence.ab: kiya mkla ku wana knan nanaq ka mudus,

sentence.chinese: 眾精友們在生命的競賽犧牲了，
sentence.ab: pspung mudus ciida ka kkuwi snaw u wada mhuqil da,

sentence.chinese: 生命原來是一場慘烈的戰鬥，
sentence.ab: kla kingal beyhing bay tndyalan ka kndusan,
mudus ka mbiyax,
mhuqil ka ini kbiyax,
wada ku qulung mbiyax hiti ka yaku,

sentence.chinese: 榮獲生命的的桂冠和喜悅，
sentence.ab: wada ku mangal qbubu mi qnaras kndusan ka yaku,
diyan mi kman u sbuway ku na uuqun,
mmlux mi knmalu bay ka llingay nniqan mu,
baka bay ka kntlxan mi snlhiqan na,
dxral Kanan srsuqan knudus,
ana ku nanaq ini kla,
hmuya ma ku sqada twaan ka yaku,
binaw klaun mu,
ida niqan tmpusu ka twaan,
kana ana manu wa ruma twaan,
spramal ku na ka tmpusu twaan.
Ima ka tmpusu way hu?

sentence.chinese: 暫時的主人的名字又叫什麼呢？
sentence.ab: Ima hangan na ka tmpusu tnais uri hu?

sentence.chinese: 那暫時的主人叫「媽媽」吧！
sentence.ab: Hangan tmpusu tnais kiya u thnganan dha sa “bubu” pa!
Bubu, nii ku da.
Ini ku rngaw sunan knama,
ini ku siling sunan uri,
knhmuc ku nanaq musa mrmux mniq twaan su,
binaw snhiyi ku balay,
tmpusu su knan ka isu, bubu.
Bubu, mqaras su smtrung knan ka isu hu?
Iyux ku ini biyaw qmqita sunan,
wada ku smeliq maxal idas diyax ka yaku,
diyan mi kman u miyah ku pcaping knan nanaq,
bubu, nii ku da.
Iyux ku pteura balay bay lnglungan mu,

sentence.chinese: 我決定以赤身露體與妳見面。
sentence.ab: kiya spuda mu tbburang miyah tqita sunan.
